conservative.name: Clear Skies
conservative.requirements: 3 power. You must be exposed to the open sky

success.description: The weather clears above your head. You may now study the night sky, regardless of the weather, for about the next hour

The effect is stronger still, inclement weather calms within close range of you, canceling all penalties associated with it. If that inclement weather is the result of a spell or blessing, you must perform a Spellcraft (Int) check vs. the caster's Discipline (WP) to calm it; if you fail, the penalties are unaffected (but you may still study the night sky)
